TEXT.source: Amis Wikipedia, article: 安倍晋三
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: 安倍晋三Apiesinco , Takaray sowal I 1954 miheca saka 9 folad saka 21 romi'ad sofocen, o mikapotay to Ciyuminsiyuto , o Sosiyan no Dipon. O tada no sieci a loma' ko laloma'an ni Apiesinco,o winaay a faki ira ci Kisinoposki aci Satoisaku , sa ira ko sowal cecay a laloma'an tatolo ko malatapangay. o akong ningra malakiingay,wama ningra malatapangay no sifo. I 1982 miheca satapang misinkiw,28 ho ko mihecaan ningra, i 1993 miheca pakaala to sinkiw nani Yamakuci kowan a lipoiing, i 2006 miheca tahira i 2007 miheca miceror ci Koicumi Ciyuiciro mala solitaycin, cecay miheca ciadada to tinai' sawad sa malatapang. I 2012 miheca saka9 folad, miliyaw heca maala mala solitaycin, tahira i 2020 miheca saka8 folad saka 28 romi'ad malaliyaw koya tinai' a adada, laheci sato a misawad mala solitaycin. Ono ka'emangan ho a 'orip ato pitilid I 1954 miheca saka 9 folad saka 21 romi'ad i Tokyu a sofocen, o tatapangan a niyaro' itiraay i Yamakuci kowan, o aniniay a Ciyomon-si.o wama ningra i na malatapangay no sifo yo mala solitaycin ci Nakasoni-Yasuhiro , o wina ci Kisi-yoko o dengan wawa ni Kisi-noposuki, tatoloay malikaka, nano mamangan minengneng to kala tapang no wama ato faki. Mitilid ho i kaocong, o kakaolahan a kamok o cili(palapalaan) , yo misawad to nani kaocong micomod i Sikitaykaku i Tokyo(成蹊大學;せいけいだいがく,Seikei University)mihatatanam to sieci, 1977 miheca malepon to ko pitilid i taykaku, tayra i Amirika mikinkiw to sieci,mafatad ko mihecaan sawad sa a mitilid minokay i Dipon. 1979 miheca matayal i Kopi-Misamaraday. To cila a mihecaan satapang to a misinkiw to sieci, mararid a matayal tono sifo a demak. O lalengatan a makuwang mipatay Ira ko sinkiw no Dipon I 2022miheca saka 7 folad saka 10 romi'ad to Fafa'eday-Pikaykian a iing,mipadang i Apie to niyahan a kasafelaw i Nara mikimod i lawac no lalan,makuwang matama i li'er ato falohang i faloco', tangsolan pakahikoki patayra i paisingan a micaloh paising, toya romi'ad herek no lahok 17:03 ko toki mila'eto to sera' 67 ko mihecaan ningra. Oya mikuwangay a tamdaw o sofitay no riyar ci Yamakami ticiya macepet itira to toya pikuwangan ningra.ona Yamakami hananay a fainayan a kapah to wawa ho mapatayay to ko wama ningra, 1980 miheca a sofocen, anini 41 ko mihecaan,2002 miheca saka 12 folad mitilid i Nakasaki kowan, misawad i, misikan malasofitay no riyaran,nani 2003 miheca tahira i 2005 miheca ko kalasofitayan i riyar. O sowal ni Yamakami to tayhin, micokeray ci Apie to Malacecayay-Pitooran, orira ko sakaci'inter ako ci Apiean sanay. Ona pitooran i,o nani Hankoay matenak tayni i Dipon, o ngangan nona pitooran " ; Hanko a sowal:세계평화통일가정연합), o 'aiaway a ngangan o 統一教hananay. Mapinko ko loma' to sapakifo o wina ni Yamakami o salikaka nona kiwkay, na micomod ko wina ningra tona pitooran mapaci'ci no kiwkay a papipakifo to adihayay a payso,mapaliwalay to tosa a loma' to sapakifo aca, i 2002 miheca patalahekal to kapinko no loma no tireng. O kaka sa ningra halafin ko kaciadada cato ka pakahadidi to mikiyamay a 'orip kinapatay sanay to, ona sa ci Yamakami yo itira ho i kalasofitayan ciharateng to sakapatayaw. O roma a sowal no salikaka, mipatangicay ho ko kiwkay a papi'aca to masamaamaanay dafong ni paliwalan no kiwaky, ano adihay ko pi'aca adihay ko ka hepol no raraw sanay ko sowal no kiwkay, maholac to ko mina'angan a payso, o sak'orip to awa to, orasaka liyas sanay to to kiwkay. I 2021 miheca i karafawfawan,ira ko demak nona kiwkay to "kasatateko no rihaday a kakarayan" sanay a demak, manengneng ningra i wangro(cacalayan) mikimad ci Apie to salikaka nona pitooran, o malasalikakaay a widang nona kiwkay ci Apie han sa ko piharateng tongal sa ko ka rokrok no faloco, ni Yamakami. 2022 miheca saka 7 folad saka 11 romi'ad o kakeridan no Malacecayay-Pitooran ci Tanaka Tomihiro mipasowal to simpon kisiya: 1. Oya mikuwangay mipatay ci Apiean a tamdaw ci YamakamiTacuya cowa ko salikaka no kiwkay, awaay ko kafana'an to kaira ningra a tayni mikapot to saopo no salikakak. 2. O win ani Yamakami-Ticuya i 1998 miheca micomod to kiwkay, inanengay a tayni i kiwkay, mikapot heca to kalosaopo no kiwkay tahira i 2009 miheca. Toikor awa sanay a papising, nikawrira, pisatapangan no aniniay a miheca cecay folad kinacecay a ira tayni mikapot to demak no kiwkay. 3. O pipakifo no salikaka to kiwkay ira ko "kalofolad a pakifo", "pakifo to pilipayan", "cawa ka pangangan a pakifo" ko kasasiiked, itiya ho iraay ko tata'akay a pakifo a salikaka, nikawrira, cowa ka paci'eci ko kiwkay. 4. Mafana'ay ko kiwkay to kapinko no laloma'an no wina ni Yamakami-Ticuya, nikawrira, caay ka laheci ko kafana' no kiwkay to hakowaay ko pakifo, mamanay mapinko ko loma. O pakayniay to pakifo a demak misolapay to ko tayhin, o tayhin sao ko mamafana' tonini ca to ka somowal kako itini.
S.PHON: ****apiəsinʦo~u , takaraj so~uwaɾ i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ so~ufo~uʦən, o~u mikapo~utaj to~u ʦijo~u~uminsijo~u~uto~u , o~u so~usijan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. o~u taɬ~ɮa no~u siəʦi a ɾo~umaʡ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni apiəsinʦo~u,o~u winaaj a faki ira ʦi kisino~upo~uski aʦi sato~uisako~u~u , sa ira ko~u so~uwaɾ ʦəʦaj a ɾaɾo~umaʡan tato~uɾo~u ko~u maɾatapaŋaj. o~u ako~uŋ niŋra maɾakiiŋaj,wama niŋra maɾatapaŋaj no~u sifo~u. i **** miħəʦa satapaŋ misinkiw,** ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra, i **** miħəʦa pakaaɾa to~u sinkiw nani jamako~u~uʦi ko~uwan a ɾipo~uiiŋ, i **** miħəʦa taħira i **** miħəʦa miʦəro~ur ʦi ko~uiʦo~u~umi ʦijo~u~uiʦiro~u maɾa so~uɾitajʦin, ʦəʦaj miħəʦa ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u tinaiʡ sawaɬ~ɮ sa maɾatapaŋ. i **** miħəʦa saka* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw ħəʦa maaɾa maɾa so~uɾitajʦin, taħira i **** miħəʦa saka* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaɾijaw ko~uja tinaiʡ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, ɾaħəʦi sato~u a misawaɬ~ɮ maɾa so~uɾitajʦin. o~uno~u kaʡəmaŋan ħo~u a ʡo~urip ato~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i to~ukjo~u~u a so~ufo~uʦən, o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ itiraaj i jamako~u~uʦi ko~uwan, o~u aniniaj a ʦijo~umo~un-si.o~u wama niŋra i na maɾatapaŋaj no~u sifo~u jo~u maɾa so~uɾitajʦin ʦi nakaso~uni-jaso~u~uħiro~u , o~u wina ʦi kisi-jo~uko~u o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan wawa ni kisi-no~upo~uso~u~uki, tato~uɾo~uaj maɾikaka, nano~u mamaŋan minəŋnəŋ to~u kaɾa tapaŋ no~u wama ato~u faki. mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ħo~u i kao~uʦo~uŋ, o~u kakao~uɾaħan a kamo~uk o~u ʦiɾi(paɾapaɾaan) , jo~u misawaɬ~ɮ to~u nani kao~uʦo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i sikitajkako~u~u i to~ukjo~u(****;********,səikəi o~u~unib~vərsitj)miħatatanam to~u siəʦi, **** miħəʦa maɾəpo~un to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i tajkako~u~u, tajra i amirika mikinkiw to~u siəʦi,mafataɬ~ɮ ko~u miħəʦaan sawaɬ~ɮ sa a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj i ɬ~ɮipo~un. **** miħəʦa matajaɾ i ko~upi-misamaraɬ~ɮaj. to~u ʦiɾa a miħəʦaan satapaŋ to~u a misinkiw to~u siəʦi, marariɬ~ɮ a matajaɾ to~uno~u sifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u ɾaɾəŋatan a mako~u~uwaŋ mipataj ira ko~u sinkiw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i ****miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj-pikajkian a iiŋ,mipaɬ~ɮaŋ i apiə to~u nijaħan a kasafəɾaw i nara mikimo~uɬ~ɮ i ɾawaʦ no~u ɾaɾan,mako~u~uwaŋ matama i ɾiʡər ato~u faɾo~uħaŋ i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, taŋso~uɾan pakaħiko~uki patajra i paisiŋan a miʦaɾo~uħ paisiŋ, to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk **:** ko~u to~uki miɾaʡəto~u to~u səraʡ ** ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra. o~uja miko~u~uwaŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u so~ufitaj no~u rijar ʦi jamakami tiʦija maʦəpət itira to~u to~uja piko~u~uwaŋan niŋra.o~una jamakami ħananaj a fainajan a kapaħ to~u wawa ħo~u mapatajaj to~u ko~u wama niŋra, **** miħəʦa a so~ufo~uʦən, anini ** ko~u miħəʦaan,**** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i nakasaki ko~uwan, misawaɬ~ɮ i, misikan maɾaso~ufitaj no~u rijaran,nani **** miħəʦa taħira i **** miħəʦa ko~u kaɾaso~ufitajan i rijar. o~u so~uwaɾ ni jamakami to~u tajħin, miʦo~ukəraj ʦi apiə to~u maɾaʦəʦajaj-pito~uo~uran, o~urira ko~u sakaʦiʡintər ako~u ʦi apiəan sanaj. o~una pito~uo~uran i,o~u nani ħanko~uaj matənak tajni i ɬ~ɮipo~un, o~u ŋaŋan no~una pito~uo~uran " ; ħanko~u a so~uwaɾ:**********), o~u ʡaiawaj a ŋaŋan o~u ***ħananaj. mapinko~u ko~u ɾo~umaʡ to~u sapakifo~u o~u wina ni jamakami o~u saɾikaka no~una kiwkaj, na miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u wina niŋra to~una pito~uo~uran mapaʦiʡʦi no~u kiwkaj a papipakifo~u to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a pajso~u,mapaɾiwaɾaj to~u to~usa a ɾo~umaʡ to~u sapakifo~u aʦa, i **** miħəʦa pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u kapinko~u no~u ɾo~uma no~u tirəŋ. o~u kaka sa niŋra ħaɾafin ko~u kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ʦato~u ka pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u mikijamaj a ʡo~urip kinapataj sanaj to~u, o~una sa ʦi jamakami jo~u itira ħo~u i kaɾaso~ufitajan ʦiħaratəŋ to~u sakapatajaw. o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ no~u saɾikaka, mipataŋiʦaj ħo~u ko~u kiwkaj a papiʡaʦa to~u masamaamaanaj ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ni paɾiwaɾan no~u kiwakj, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u piʡaʦa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ka ħəpo~uɾ no~u raraw sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kiwkaj, maħo~uɾaʦ to~u ko~u minaʡaŋan a pajso~u, o~u sakʡo~urip to~u awa to~u, o~urasaka ɾijas sanaj to~u to~u kiwkaj. i **** miħəʦa i karafawfawan,ira ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~una kiwkaj to~u "kasatatəko~u no~u riħaɬ~ɮaj a kakarajan" sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, manəŋnəŋ niŋra i waŋro~u(ʦaʦaɾajan) mikimaɬ~ɮ ʦi apiə to~u saɾikaka no~una pito~uo~uran, o~u maɾasaɾikakaaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ no~una kiwkaj ʦi apiə ħan sa ko~u piħaratəŋ to~uŋaɾ sa ko~u ka ro~ukro~uk no~u faɾo~uʦo~u, ni jamakami. **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u maɾaʦəʦajaj-pito~uo~uran ʦi tanaka to~umiħiro~u mipaso~uwaɾ to~u simpo~un kisija: *. o~uja miko~u~uwaŋaj mipataj ʦi apiəan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi jamakamitaʦo~u~uja ʦo~uwa ko~u saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj, awaaj ko~u kafanaʡan to~u kaira niŋra a tajni mikapo~ut to~u sao~upo~u no~u saɾikakak. *. o~u win ani jamakami-tiʦo~u~uja i **** miħəʦa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kiwkaj, inanəŋaj a tajni i kiwkaj, mikapo~ut ħəʦa to~u kaɾo~usao~upo~u no~u kiwkaj taħira i **** miħəʦa. to~uiko~ur awa sanaj a papisiŋ, nikawrira, pisatapaŋan no~u aniniaj a miħəʦa ʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ kinaʦəʦaj a ira tajni mikapo~ut to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kiwkaj. *. o~u pipakifo~u no~u saɾikaka to~u kiwkaj ira ko~u "kaɾo~ufo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a pakifo~u", "pakifo~u to~u piɾipajan", "ʦawa ka paŋaŋan a pakifo~u" ko~u kasasiikəɬ~ɮ, itija ħo~u iraaj ko~u tataʡakaj a pakifo~u a saɾikaka, nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ka paʦiʡəʦi ko~u kiwkaj. *. mafanaʡaj ko~u kiwkaj to~u kapinko~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u wina ni jamakami-tiʦo~u~uja, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~u kafanaʡ no~u kiwkaj to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u pakifo~u, mamanaj mapinko~u ko~u ɾo~uma. o~u pakajniaj to~u pakifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak miso~uɾapaj to~u ko~u tajħin, o~u tajħin sao~u ko~u mamafanaʡ to~unini ʦa to~u ka so~umo~uwaɾ kako~u itini.
S.FORM: 安倍晋三Apiesinco , Takaray sowal I 1954 miheca saka 9 folad saka 21 romi'ad sofocen, o mikapotay to Ciyuminsiyuto , o Sosiyan no Dipon. O tada no sieci a loma' ko laloma'an ni Apiesinco,o winaay a faki ira ci Kisinoposki aci Satoisaku , sa ira ko sowal cecay a laloma'an tatolo ko malatapangay. o akong ningra malakiingay,wama ningra malatapangay no sifo. I 1982 miheca satapang misinkiw,28 ho ko mihecaan ningra, i 1993 miheca pakaala to sinkiw nani Yamakuci kowan a lipoiing, i 2006 miheca tahira i 2007 miheca miceror ci Koicumi Ciyuiciro mala solitaycin, cecay miheca ciadada to tinai' sawad sa malatapang. I 2012 miheca saka9 folad, miliyaw heca maala mala solitaycin, tahira i 2020 miheca saka8 folad saka 28 romi'ad malaliyaw koya tinai' a adada, laheci sato a misawad mala solitaycin. Ono ka'emangan ho a 'orip ato pitilid I 1954 miheca saka 9 folad saka 21 romi'ad i Tokyu a sofocen, o tatapangan a niyaro' itiraay i Yamakuci kowan, o aniniay a Ciyomon-si.o wama ningra i na malatapangay no sifo yo mala solitaycin ci Nakasoni-Yasuhiro , o wina ci Kisi-yoko o dengan wawa ni Kisi-noposuki, tatoloay malikaka, nano mamangan minengneng to kala tapang no wama ato faki. Mitilid ho i kaocong, o kakaolahan a kamok o cili(palapalaan) , yo misawad to nani kaocong micomod i Sikitaykaku i Tokyo(成蹊大學;せいけいだいがく,Seikei University)mihatatanam to sieci, 1977 miheca malepon to ko pitilid i taykaku, tayra i Amirika mikinkiw to sieci,mafatad ko mihecaan sawad sa a mitilid minokay i Dipon. 1979 miheca matayal i Kopi-Misamaraday. To cila a mihecaan satapang to a misinkiw to sieci, mararid a matayal tono sifo a demak. O lalengatan a makuwang mipatay Ira ko sinkiw no Dipon I 2022miheca saka 7 folad saka 10 romi'ad to Fafa'eday-Pikaykian a iing,mipadang i Apie to niyahan a kasafelaw i Nara mikimod i lawac no lalan,makuwang matama i li'er ato falohang i faloco', tangsolan pakahikoki patayra i paisingan a micaloh paising, toya romi'ad herek no lahok 17:03 ko toki mila'eto to sera' 67 ko mihecaan ningra. Oya mikuwangay a tamdaw o sofitay no riyar ci Yamakami ticiya macepet itira to toya pikuwangan ningra.ona Yamakami hananay a fainayan a kapah to wawa ho mapatayay to ko wama ningra, 1980 miheca a sofocen, anini 41 ko mihecaan,2002 miheca saka 12 folad mitilid i Nakasaki kowan, misawad i, misikan malasofitay no riyaran,nani 2003 miheca tahira i 2005 miheca ko kalasofitayan i riyar. O sowal ni Yamakami to tayhin, micokeray ci Apie to Malacecayay-Pitooran, orira ko sakaci'inter ako ci Apiean sanay. Ona pitooran i,o nani Hankoay matenak tayni i Dipon, o ngangan nona pitooran " ; Hanko a sowal:세계평화통일가정연합), o 'aiaway a ngangan o 統一教hananay. Mapinko ko loma' to sapakifo o wina ni Yamakami o salikaka nona kiwkay, na micomod ko wina ningra tona pitooran mapaci'ci no kiwkay a papipakifo to adihayay a payso,mapaliwalay to tosa a loma' to sapakifo aca, i 2002 miheca patalahekal to kapinko no loma no tireng. O kaka sa ningra halafin ko kaciadada cato ka pakahadidi to mikiyamay a 'orip kinapatay sanay to, ona sa ci Yamakami yo itira ho i kalasofitayan ciharateng to sakapatayaw. O roma a sowal no salikaka, mipatangicay ho ko kiwkay a papi'aca to masamaamaanay dafong ni paliwalan no kiwaky, ano adihay ko pi'aca adihay ko ka hepol no raraw sanay ko sowal no kiwkay, maholac to ko mina'angan a payso, o sak'orip to awa to, orasaka liyas sanay to to kiwkay. I 2021 miheca i karafawfawan,ira ko demak nona kiwkay to "kasatateko no rihaday a kakarayan" sanay a demak, manengneng ningra i wangro(cacalayan) mikimad ci Apie to salikaka nona pitooran, o malasalikakaay a widang nona kiwkay ci Apie han sa ko piharateng tongal sa ko ka rokrok no faloco, ni Yamakami. 2022 miheca saka 7 folad saka 11 romi'ad o kakeridan no Malacecayay-Pitooran ci Tanaka Tomihiro mipasowal to simpon kisiya: 1. Oya mikuwangay mipatay ci Apiean a tamdaw ci YamakamiTacuya cowa ko salikaka no kiwkay, awaay ko kafana'an to kaira ningra a tayni mikapot to saopo no salikakak. 2. O win ani Yamakami-Ticuya i 1998 miheca micomod to kiwkay, inanengay a tayni i kiwkay, mikapot heca to kalosaopo no kiwkay tahira i 2009 miheca. Toikor awa sanay a papising, nikawrira, pisatapangan no aniniay a miheca cecay folad kinacecay a ira tayni mikapot to demak no kiwkay. 3. O pipakifo no salikaka to kiwkay ira ko "kalofolad a pakifo", "pakifo to pilipayan", "cawa ka pangangan a pakifo" ko kasasiiked, itiya ho iraay ko tata'akay a pakifo a salikaka, nikawrira, cowa ka paci'eci ko kiwkay. 4. Mafana'ay ko kiwkay to kapinko no laloma'an no wina ni Yamakami-Ticuya, nikawrira, caay ka laheci ko kafana' no kiwkay to hakowaay ko pakifo, mamanay mapinko ko loma. O pakayniay to pakifo a demak misolapay to ko tayhin, o tayhin sao ko mamafana' tonini ca to ka somowal kako itini.
S.PHON: ****apiəsinʦo~u , takaraj so~uwaɾ i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ so~ufo~uʦən, o~u mikapo~utaj to~u ʦijo~u~uminsijo~u~uto~u , o~u so~usijan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un. o~u taɬ~ɮa no~u siəʦi a ɾo~umaʡ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni apiəsinʦo~u,o~u winaaj a faki ira ʦi kisino~upo~uski aʦi sato~uisako~u~u , sa ira ko~u so~uwaɾ ʦəʦaj a ɾaɾo~umaʡan tato~uɾo~u ko~u maɾatapaŋaj. o~u ako~uŋ niŋra maɾakiiŋaj,wama niŋra maɾatapaŋaj no~u sifo~u. i **** miħəʦa satapaŋ misinkiw,** ħo~u ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra, i **** miħəʦa pakaaɾa to~u sinkiw nani jamako~u~uʦi ko~uwan a ɾipo~uiiŋ, i **** miħəʦa taħira i **** miħəʦa miʦəro~ur ʦi ko~uiʦo~u~umi ʦijo~u~uiʦiro~u maɾa so~uɾitajʦin, ʦəʦaj miħəʦa ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u tinaiʡ sawaɬ~ɮ sa maɾatapaŋ. i **** miħəʦa saka* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw ħəʦa maaɾa maɾa so~uɾitajʦin, taħira i **** miħəʦa saka* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾaɾijaw ko~uja tinaiʡ a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, ɾaħəʦi sato~u a misawaɬ~ɮ maɾa so~uɾitajʦin. o~uno~u kaʡəmaŋan ħo~u a ʡo~urip ato~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i to~ukjo~u~u a so~ufo~uʦən, o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ itiraaj i jamako~u~uʦi ko~uwan, o~u aniniaj a ʦijo~umo~un-si.o~u wama niŋra i na maɾatapaŋaj no~u sifo~u jo~u maɾa so~uɾitajʦin ʦi nakaso~uni-jaso~u~uħiro~u , o~u wina ʦi kisi-jo~uko~u o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan wawa ni kisi-no~upo~uso~u~uki, tato~uɾo~uaj maɾikaka, nano~u mamaŋan minəŋnəŋ to~u kaɾa tapaŋ no~u wama ato~u faki. mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ħo~u i kao~uʦo~uŋ, o~u kakao~uɾaħan a kamo~uk o~u ʦiɾi(paɾapaɾaan) , jo~u misawaɬ~ɮ to~u nani kao~uʦo~uŋ miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i sikitajkako~u~u i to~ukjo~u(****;********,səikəi o~u~unib~vərsitj)miħatatanam to~u siəʦi, **** miħəʦa maɾəpo~un to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ i tajkako~u~u, tajra i amirika mikinkiw to~u siəʦi,mafataɬ~ɮ ko~u miħəʦaan sawaɬ~ɮ sa a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj i ɬ~ɮipo~un. **** miħəʦa matajaɾ i ko~upi-misamaraɬ~ɮaj. to~u ʦiɾa a miħəʦaan satapaŋ to~u a misinkiw to~u siəʦi, marariɬ~ɮ a matajaɾ to~uno~u sifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u ɾaɾəŋatan a mako~u~uwaŋ mipataj ira ko~u sinkiw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~un i ****miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj-pikajkian a iiŋ,mipaɬ~ɮaŋ i apiə to~u nijaħan a kasafəɾaw i nara mikimo~uɬ~ɮ i ɾawaʦ no~u ɾaɾan,mako~u~uwaŋ matama i ɾiʡər ato~u faɾo~uħaŋ i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, taŋso~uɾan pakaħiko~uki patajra i paisiŋan a miʦaɾo~uħ paisiŋ, to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk **:** ko~u to~uki miɾaʡəto~u to~u səraʡ ** ko~u miħəʦaan niŋra. o~uja miko~u~uwaŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u so~ufitaj no~u rijar ʦi jamakami tiʦija maʦəpət itira to~u to~uja piko~u~uwaŋan niŋra.o~una jamakami ħananaj a fainajan a kapaħ to~u wawa ħo~u mapatajaj to~u ko~u wama niŋra, **** miħəʦa a so~ufo~uʦən, anini ** ko~u miħəʦaan,**** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ mitiɾiɬ~ɮ i nakasaki ko~uwan, misawaɬ~ɮ i, misikan maɾaso~ufitaj no~u rijaran,nani **** miħəʦa taħira i **** miħəʦa ko~u kaɾaso~ufitajan i rijar. o~u so~uwaɾ ni jamakami to~u tajħin, miʦo~ukəraj ʦi apiə to~u maɾaʦəʦajaj-pito~uo~uran, o~urira ko~u sakaʦiʡintər ako~u ʦi apiəan sanaj. o~una pito~uo~uran i,o~u nani ħanko~uaj matənak tajni i ɬ~ɮipo~un, o~u ŋaŋan no~una pito~uo~uran " ; ħanko~u a so~uwaɾ:**********), o~u ʡaiawaj a ŋaŋan o~u ***ħananaj. mapinko~u ko~u ɾo~umaʡ to~u sapakifo~u o~u wina ni jamakami o~u saɾikaka no~una kiwkaj, na miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u wina niŋra to~una pito~uo~uran mapaʦiʡʦi no~u kiwkaj a papipakifo~u to~u aɬ~ɮiħajaj a pajso~u,mapaɾiwaɾaj to~u to~usa a ɾo~umaʡ to~u sapakifo~u aʦa, i **** miħəʦa pataɾaħəkaɾ to~u kapinko~u no~u ɾo~uma no~u tirəŋ. o~u kaka sa niŋra ħaɾafin ko~u kaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ʦato~u ka pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi to~u mikijamaj a ʡo~urip kinapataj sanaj to~u, o~una sa ʦi jamakami jo~u itira ħo~u i kaɾaso~ufitajan ʦiħaratəŋ to~u sakapatajaw. o~u ro~uma a so~uwaɾ no~u saɾikaka, mipataŋiʦaj ħo~u ko~u kiwkaj a papiʡaʦa to~u masamaamaanaj ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ni paɾiwaɾan no~u kiwakj, ano~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u piʡaʦa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ka ħəpo~uɾ no~u raraw sanaj ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kiwkaj, maħo~uɾaʦ to~u ko~u minaʡaŋan a pajso~u, o~u sakʡo~urip to~u awa to~u, o~urasaka ɾijas sanaj to~u to~u kiwkaj. i **** miħəʦa i karafawfawan,ira ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~una kiwkaj to~u "kasatatəko~u no~u riħaɬ~ɮaj a kakarajan" sanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, manəŋnəŋ niŋra i waŋro~u(ʦaʦaɾajan) mikimaɬ~ɮ ʦi apiə to~u saɾikaka no~una pito~uo~uran, o~u maɾasaɾikakaaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ no~una kiwkaj ʦi apiə ħan sa ko~u piħaratəŋ to~uŋaɾ sa ko~u ka ro~ukro~uk no~u faɾo~uʦo~u, ni jamakami. **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u maɾaʦəʦajaj-pito~uo~uran ʦi tanaka to~umiħiro~u mipaso~uwaɾ to~u simpo~un kisija: *. o~uja miko~u~uwaŋaj mipataj ʦi apiəan a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi jamakamitaʦo~u~uja ʦo~uwa ko~u saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj, awaaj ko~u kafanaʡan to~u kaira niŋra a tajni mikapo~ut to~u sao~upo~u no~u saɾikakak. *. o~u win ani jamakami-tiʦo~u~uja i **** miħəʦa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kiwkaj, inanəŋaj a tajni i kiwkaj, mikapo~ut ħəʦa to~u kaɾo~usao~upo~u no~u kiwkaj taħira i **** miħəʦa. to~uiko~ur awa sanaj a papisiŋ, nikawrira, pisatapaŋan no~u aniniaj a miħəʦa ʦəʦaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ kinaʦəʦaj a ira tajni mikapo~ut to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kiwkaj. *. o~u pipakifo~u no~u saɾikaka to~u kiwkaj ira ko~u "kaɾo~ufo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a pakifo~u", "pakifo~u to~u piɾipajan", "ʦawa ka paŋaŋan a pakifo~u" ko~u kasasiikəɬ~ɮ, itija ħo~u iraaj ko~u tataʡakaj a pakifo~u a saɾikaka, nikawrira, ʦo~uwa ka paʦiʡəʦi ko~u kiwkaj. *. mafanaʡaj ko~u kiwkaj to~u kapinko~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u wina ni jamakami-tiʦo~u~uja, nikawrira, ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~u kafanaʡ no~u kiwkaj to~u ħako~uwaaj ko~u pakifo~u, mamanaj mapinko~u ko~u ɾo~uma. o~u pakajniaj to~u pakifo~u a ɬ~ɮəmak miso~uɾapaj to~u ko~u tajħin, o~u tajħin sao~u ko~u mamafanaʡ to~unini ʦa to~u ka so~umo~uwaɾ kako~u itini.
